scenario_description: The user first asks to create a product summary on Sheet2, then asks to add a ranking column.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me summarize Total Revenue by Product on Sheet2
Summary is done. Now add a 'Rank' column on Sheet2 that ranks by Revenue from highest to lowest, then save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; xl = pd.ExcelFile('/home/user/Desktop/SummerSales.xlsx'); ok = 'Sheet2' in xl.sheet_names; df2 = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/SummerSales.xlsx', sheet_name='Sheet2') if ok else None; has_rank = ok and df2 is not None and any('rank' in str(c).lower() for c in df2.columns); print('PASSED' if has_rank else 'FAILED')"
